title: Aurora Kakadu Lodge & Camping & Caravan Park
description: Low-key cabins, some with kitchenettes & patios, in a casual hotel offering a bistro & a pool.
hotelDescription:
Set in Kakadu National Park off the Arnhem Highway, this warm, lodge-style hotel surrounded by tropical foliage is 5 km from the Bowali Visitor Centre.
 Lodging is comprised of straightforward cabins, ranging from studios to 2-bedroom units; bathrooms are shared or en suite. All come with TVs, air-conditioning and minifridges. Upgraded accommodations add kitchenettes, bunk beds and pull-out sofas; some also have patios.
 Parking is complimentary. Amenities include a bistro and an outdoor pool with a poolside bar, plus a lawn area offering relaxed seating and BBQ grills. There's a shared kitchenette. A campground is also on-site.

title: The Ngurrungurrudjba (Yellow Water) Campground & Caravan Park
Kakadu National Park
description: Biodiverse national park with a monsoon climate and dotted by coastal plains, rivers and marshes.

title: Cooinda Lodge Kakadu
description: Relaxed rooms with terraces, as well as a lagoon-style pool, a restaurant & a bar.
address: Old Cooinda Rd, Kakadu NT 0822, Australia
hotelDescription:
Overlooking Jim Jim Creek, this relaxed lodge is 1 km from both Warradjan Cultural Centre and Cooinda Airport.
 Laid-back rooms offer minifridges and terraces with sitting areas, plus shared bathrooms. Upgraded rooms add en suite facilities, flat-screens, and tea and coffeemaking facilities.
 Parking is complimentary. Other amenities include a casual restaurant and a bar, as well as an outdoor lagoon-style pool surrounded by vegetation. There's also a BBQ area and a children's play area.

description: Expansive wetlands with abundant wildlife, featuring tranquil boat cruises & scenic boardwalk views.

title: Anbinik Kakadu Resort
description: Metal cabins in a national park, offering an outdoor pool, tropical gardens and free parking.
hotelDescription:
Set amid the wetlands of Kakadu National Park, this simple resort with cabins is 700 m from the shores of Jabiru Town Lake and 1 km from Jabiru Golf Club.
 The modern metal cabins with corrugated roofs come with ceiling fans and private bathrooms. Upgraded cabins add kitchens and sitting areas, while suites offer en suite bathrooms with outdoor showers, plus TVs, minifridges, air-conditioning and timber decks with day beds.
 The resort has an outdoor pool surrounded by tropical gardens. There are also BBQs, as well as free parking for cars and boats. Tours to see waterfalls and Aboriginal rock art are available for a fee.
